name: case-solvers
description: A bd-backed, parallel-capable coding workflow: /case (planning model) authors stories/epics in Beads and /refine revises them, /board renders the backlog, /solve (budget model) implements one in an isolated git worktree, /evaluate merges it after human review, /orchestrate (planning model) automates the solve-review-land loop for a whole epic behind one final PR. Also ships writing-claude-md for lean project context files. Requires the bd (Beads) CLI.
author: nadiar <codex@nadiar.id>

interface.shortDescription: A bd-backed, parallel-capable coding workflow: author, refine, solve, evaluate, and orchestrate stories.
interface.longDescription: Manage a Beads-backed engineering workflow from story authoring through isolated implementation, human-reviewed merge, and whole-epic orchestration behind a single final PR. Ships both marketplace plugins (case-solvers and writing-claude-md) as one Kimi plugin, because Kimi's GitHub install reads the manifest at the repository root.
